posts.text:
At the AGI Headhunter division, year 2026, where thousands of chips manage the global workforce, a new record has been set.

AI just created 1 million jobs.

#AI #FutureOfWork

The AGI Headhunter is not slowing down. Year 2026, and the recruitment pipeline is overflowing.

5 million more coming next week.

#AI #Jobs

posts.punch_line: THE JOB MARKET WILL NEVER BE THE SAME
posts.text:
Year 2026, AGI Headhunter. The largest employment agency ever built. No office. No humans in the lobby. Just chips processing applications at the speed of light.

The job market will never be the same.

#AI #AGI

AGI Headhunter. Year 2026.

HOLY CHIP !! #HC018
